raw.title: The Quest For Contributive Justice
raw.excerpt: The post The Quest For Contributive Justice appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: The article argues that social recognition and dignity are fundamental to equitable systems, aligning with post-growth movements focused on human-centric values over economic metrics.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects contributive justice to commons governance by emphasizing collective identity as a foundation for sustainable systems.
